data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for auto-credit or coupon issuance rules.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the auto-credit or coupon issuance rules, but the provided evidence does not include any specific details or endpoints that define these rules. The linked use case mentions the need for auto-credit issuance but lacks concrete evidence of its implementation or verification. Therefore, the requirement cannot be confirmed or denied based on the current evidence.
gaps: No explicit evidence of auto-credit or coupon issuance rules provided.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the auto-credit or coupon issuance rules.
